Class ZookeeperConfigProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.zookeeper.config.ZookeeperConfigProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.cloud.zookeeper.config") public class ZookeeperConfigProperties extends Object
Properties related to keeping configuration in Zookeeper.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Spencer Gibb
See Also:
